_comment: Reproducer for TKA-10324 — Gradle 9 toolchain-only Java config fails GHE dependency resolution.
_expected_behaviour: Scanner SHOULD resolve all 5 direct deps (slf4j-api, guava, jackson-databind, commons-lang3, logback-classic) and their transitives. Currently it returns 0 deps because the toolchain resolution fails inside whitesourceDependenciesTask.
description: Autotest configuration file for dependency tree detection validation

scan_output._comment_security_scan_report_conclusion: Expected 'failure' while the bug is open — scanner returns 0 deps so no vulns detected. Update to 'failure' or remove once fixed.

dependency_tree._comment_expected_dependencies: BUG ACTIVE: scanner returns 0 deps due to toolchain resolution failure. Set to 0 while tracking TKA-10324. Update to real counts (gte: 5 direct, gte: 20 total) once the fix is delivered.
dependency_tree._comment_fix_target: Once TKA-10324 is fixed, expected values should be: total gte 20, direct gte 5. Direct deps: slf4j-api, guava, jackson-databind, commons-lang3, logback-classic (+ transitive chain).

base_config._comment_logs: Validate that the known error message appears in scanner logs while the bug is open.
